generated_oml:
// C11: Enablers (merged definitions with descriptions and enables)
instance MATLABSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment used for executable simulation of motor, gearwheel and gearbox models",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                     VisualizationTorqueVelocityService,
                     ParameterUpdateService,
                     FrictionLossReportService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that transports live sensor streams from the robot to the digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard used for visualizing twin data and reports",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationTorqueVelocityService,
                     FrictionLossReportInsight
]

instance SinumerikControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D s‑l controller that executes updated motion parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables UpdateRobotControllerService
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool employed for structural/behavioral modeling of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelVisualizationService
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder on the first rotational axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderMQTT
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox of the first rotational axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderMQTT
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current I_M on the first rotational axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMQTT
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance MotorEncoderMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle r_M derived from the motor‑mounted encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω computed from encoder angle time‑series",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current I_M measured by the current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque τ obtained from the dynamics calculation model",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderMQTT,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C10: Insights
instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live sensor stream (current, angle, velocity) received via MQTT"
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time identified friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the gearbox"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion control accuracy after parameter updating"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintenance recommendations derived from friction‑loss reports"
]

instance ToolSelectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tool selection guidance based on simulated torque/velocity performance"
]

instance FrictionLossReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated report detailing calculated friction losses in the gearbox"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural view of the first rotational axis created with SysML"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams live sensor data over MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies gearbox friction parameters in real time from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance VisualizationTorqueVelocityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes measured and simulated torque and velocity on a web dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight,
                     MaintenanceDecisionInsight,
                     ToolSelectionInsight
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates model‑based parameters in the robot controller",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance FrictionLossReportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates friction‑loss reports for engineering decisions",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossReportInsight
]

instance UpdateRobotControllerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Feeds derived friction parameters back to the SINUMERIK 840D controller",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateRobotControllerAction
]

instance StructuralModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays the SysML structural model of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLFirstAxisStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagram of the first rotational axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the motor including dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the gearwheel",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Frictionless gearbox model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Gearbox friction model (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DynamicsTorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model converting angle, velocity and acceleration to torque τ",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateRobotControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feeds derived friction parameters back to the SINUMERIK controller to improve motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is defined as a one‑way data flow; no commands or control signals are sent back to the physical robot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (MABI robot first axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that consume input data traces and produce simulated traces, and Models (engineering, simulation, data calculation) linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model; all data are visualized in a dashboard."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each DataPoint to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces against measured reference traces; multi‑physics aware identification to capture load, temperature, wear effects; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol; the Asset Administration Shell provides standardized metadata linking."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset description and SysML as an MBSE modeling standard."
]
